things.name: Basilica del Pilar
things.description: Magnificent baroque basilica on the Ebro river, one of Spain's most visited pilgrimage sites

things.name: Aljaferia Palace
things.description: Stunning 11th-century Moorish palace, the finest outside Andalusia

things.name: La Seo Cathedral
things.description: Gothic-Mudejar cathedral with extraordinary tapestry museum

things.name: El Tubo
things.description: Labyrinth of narrow streets in the old town, heart of Zaragoza's tapas culture

things.name: Goya Museum
things.description: Museum dedicated to Francisco de Goya, born nearby in Fuendetodos

things.name: Roman Ruins of Caesar Augusta
things.description: Network of underground museums revealing the Roman city beneath Zaragoza

things.name: Parque Grande Jose Antonio Labordeta
things.description: Vast city park with rose garden, fountains and sports facilities

things.name: Mercado Central
things.description: Modernist covered market with local Aragonese produce

things.name: Stone Bridge (Puente de Piedra)
things.description: Historic seven-arch stone bridge over the Ebro dating to the 15th century

things.name: Pablo Serrano Museum
things.description: Collection of Aragonese sculptor Pablo Serrano with rotating exhibitions
